name: Glazed Pork Loin Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 Fresh Pork Loin Roast (2 to 2.5 lbs, boneless)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut 4 slits in the fat on the pork roast using the tip of a sharp knife. Insert a piece of garlic into each slit.
2. Sprinkle the roast with salt.
3. Mix the orange marmalade, mustard, and dried thyme leaves together. Spread this mixture over the roast.
4. Place the roast in a 16 x 10-inch cooking bag. Close the bag loosely with string, leaving an opening about the size of a finger for air circulation.
5. Put the roast on a microwave-safe roasting rack in an oblong baking dish measuring 12 x 7 x 2 inches.
6. Microwave on medium-low (30%) power for 30 minutes.
7. Turn the roast over and turn the dish halfway. Continue microwaving until the internal temperature reaches 170°F as measured with a meat thermometer inserted at several points in the roast, about 20 to 25 minutes.
8. Allow the roast to stand in the bag for 10 minutes before opening it. Serve with the juices.
